title: Suny's Intimidation Mod
description: Based off that one Reddit post in r/PhoenixSC by u/Safe_Associate_1173. Wearing powerful armour makes you scary to mobs
body:
The more powerful (or shiny!) your armour is, the more intimidating you become, and some mobs get scared of you.

Original Reddit post that inspired the creation of this mod by u/Safe_Associate_1173:

https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/1qhbz6f/what_if_minecraft_had_an_intimidation_mechanic/

Future changes (such as mobs running away from VERY intimidating players) may or may not happen depending on how I feel, the weather, the world's political and economical situation, and the current alignment of the stars.
